name: Chocolate Pixies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt margarine and chocolate, stirring until smooth.
2. Remove from heat; cool slightly.
3. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup; level off.
4. Stir in flour, sugar, walnuts, baking powder, salt, and eggs; blend in well.
5. Cover; refrigerate at least 1 hour for easier handling.
6. Preheat oven to 300°F.
7. Shape mixture into 1-inch balls; roll in powdered sugar (coat heavily).
8. Place the balls 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake at 300°F for 15-18 minutes, or until edges are set.
10. Remove from the cookie sheets immediately.
11. Yield: 4 dozen cookies.
